wine_schools.name: The Wine School at WOW
wine_schools.address: Rua do Choupelo 39, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_schools.description: The wine school inside the WOW cultural district in Gaia, running WSET Level 1 and 2 courses plus tastings, pairings and workshops in Portuguese and English.
wine_schools.price_range: Workshops from around EUR 25; WSET Level 2 around EUR 400

verified.address_quoted: 39 Rua do Choupelo, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia

wine_schools.name: Plansel International Wine School (Douro)
wine_schools.address: Avenida de Lagoas 93, Quinta das Sequeirinhas, 5100-664 Penajóia, Portugal
wine_schools.description: A WSET Approved Programme Provider running courses in the Douro at Quinta das Sequeirinhas near Régua, with WSET-trained educators and tasting-led sessions.
wine_schools.price_range: WSET Level 1 from around EUR 200 to WSET Level 3 around EUR 1100

wine_schools.name: Quinta do Vallado Tastings and Cooking Classes
wine_schools.address: Vilarinho dos Freires, 5050-364 Peso da Régua, Portugal
wine_schools.neighborhood: Vilarinho dos Freires, Peso da Régua, Baixo Corgo
wine_schools.description: The Vallado estate near Régua runs daily cellar visits with guided tastings plus cooking classes that pair Douro dishes with the quinta's own wines and Ports.
courses_offered: Daily cellar visit with guided tasting at 17:00
wine_schools.price_range: Cellar visit and tasting from around EUR 15; cooking classes priced on request

verified.address_quoted: Vilarinho dos Freires, 5050-364 Peso da Régua

wine_schools.name: Cálem Tasting Experiences
wine_schools.address: Avenida Diogo Leite 344, 4400-111 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_schools.description: Cálem's Gaia cellar runs structured Port education sessions, from guided tasting flights to blind-tasting and Port-and-chocolate workshops with house experts.

verified.address_quoted: Avenida Diogo Leite, 344, 4400-111 Vila Nova de Gaia
